lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Hello there. Welcome to my magic emporium.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see your wares?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm not into magic.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Well, if you see anyone who is, please send them my way.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Hello again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see your wares?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I managed to decipher those notes.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Oh really? Please do tell. It's been driving me crazy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seems like he was trying to find the runes for the Varrock teleport spell.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Ah, of course. I'm not sure how I didn't figure that out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I buy some more pink dye?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Of course. It's 20 coins per bottle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'll pass.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough room for any.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Good job. I have new information to share with you.
